craft.title: Craft your stay, before you book.
craft.description: Answer a few calm questions. We'll suggest a stay, a loose itinerary, and the small details that make it feel like yours.

philosophy.definition1: a deliberate refusal to be rushed; the Bulgarian concept of living at nature's pace, choosing presence over productivity and real connection over constant connection.
philosophy.definition2: the guiding principle behind Drift & Dwells: we create spaces where you can disconnect from the noise and reconnect with what matters—nature, yourself, and meaningful moments.
